facebook.caption: Not every great find in Phu Quoc is on the beach. GÓC CÀ PHÊ - Phú Quốc Riverside Coffee, Tea & Books is the kind of tucked-away cafe that turns a slow morning into a proper memory. Sit with a coffee or tea, browse the books, and watch the riverside world drift by. Rated 4.6/5 by guests, it earns every bit of that. Practical tip: this spot is ideal for early mornings before the island heat kicks in.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the river, sip something warm, forget your itinerary for an hour. GÓC CÀ PHÊ - Phú Quốc Riverside Coffee, Tea & Books is exactly the kind of corner cafe Phu Quoc hides well. Shelves of books, soft light, a riverside view. Some places you stumble into and never want to leave.

instagram.caption: Books, tea, and a riverside view in Phu Quoc. GÓC CÀ PHÊ - Phú Quốc Riverside Coffee, Tea & Books is your sign to slow down. Rated 4.6/5 and worth every minute. Go early, stay long.
instagram.video_caption: Soft light, good coffee, shelves full of books, and a river outside the window. GÓC CÀ PHÊ - Phú Quốc Riverside Coffee, Tea & Books is the morning reset you didn't know you needed.

tiktok.caption: A riverside cafe with books and great coffee hiding in Phu Quoc. Early mornings here are magic. #PhuQuoc #CafeHopping #VietnamTravel #HiddenGem
